hypothesis: Three changes stacked: (1) chunk_size=32 halves the prediction horizon and causal lag, (2) dual Macro pass (teacher=current chunk, student=previous chunk, same Block 1 weights) gives a cleaner distillation signal — student learns to COMPENSATE for missing current chunk, not just temporal smoothness, (3) cosine distillation is more collapse-resistant than MSE. No broadcast shift needed — student's inputs are inherently causal so broadcast goes directly to same chunk.

broadcast.from: shifted (chunk c gets c-1, chunk 0 gets zeros)
